intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by the visual evidence. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/unidentifiable. P2 (Mexican Mint) and P4 (Silver Guest) are not clearly distinguishable as separate specimens in the black pot. P3 (Pothos) is present but shows signs of severe decline.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No plant material visible in yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No identifiable Mexican Mint present.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present: Pothos specimen remains, though in poor condition.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No identifiable Silver Guest present.

plant_audit.P1: Yellow pot is empty of foliage; soil appears dry and undisturbed.
plant_audit.P2_P4: Black pot contains a single, struggling stem/leaf structure and organic debris (eggshells).
plant_audit.P3: Pothos is the only surviving specimen, showing significant postural collapse and loss of turgor pressure.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Soil appears consistently dark and potentially hydrophobic in the yellow pot; the black pot shows signs of surface debris (eggshells).
biome_observations.desk_surface: Debris (electronic components/pins) observed in early images, cleared in later images.

temporal_deltas.T_earliest_to_T-5: Minor shift in desk debris; plant posture remains static.
temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-3: No significant biological change; Pothos remains in a state of decline.
temporal_deltas.T-3_to_T-1: Increased lighting contrast; Pothos leaf appears to be losing structural integrity.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_Current: Severe light reduction; plant visibility is near zero, indicating a potential failure of the light source or extreme environmental darkening.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of terminal decline. The Pothos (P3) is the only remaining specimen, and it exhibits signs of severe dehydration or root-zone failure. The absence of the other registered plants suggests a total loss of the initial collection.

anomalies.interventions: Introduction of crushed eggshells into the black pot (P3/P4) as a calcium/soil amendment.
anomalies.debris: Electronic pins/components present on the desk surface in early images, removed by T-1.

vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical collection has suffered a catastrophic failure. The yellow pot (P1) is devoid of life. The black pot, which should contain P2, P3, and P4, now only supports a single, failing Pothos cutting. The presence of eggshells suggests an attempt at intervention, which has failed to arrest the decline. The current state is characterized by near-total darkness and the loss of all secondary specimens.
